content: 2026-04-02 Session Summary: Major security hardening of Mission Control. Fixed OpenClaw 2026.4.1 wake system - cron tool was on gateway HTTP deny list, fixed by adding gateway.tools.allow:cron. Completed 7/8 security audit items: (1) removed debug endpoint, (2) standardized auth patterns with withAuth/withAgent wrappers, (3) added rate limiting on login 5/15min and register 3/hr, (4) file access scoping saved as separate task, (5) sanitized error messages in production, (6) added security headers via Caddy including HSTS and X-Frame-Options, (7) locked DB/Redis/App ports to 127.0.0.1 only, (8) rotated JWT secret to crypto-random 64-byte key. Also fixed: exec approval settings, cookie secure flag for HTTPS, Docker service names instead of host IPs, mc-send.js updated for localhost. Key commits: 4acc45a, 4ae251e, 2570e7d, 1a3da59. OpenClaw config changes: gateway.tools.allow cron, gateway.http.endpoints.chatCompletions enabled, tools.exec.security full, tools.exec.ask off.
